overall.description: A static cinematic shot from the video game Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic waterfront cityscape. The scene features a dense cyberpunk skyline with towering skyscrapers, industrial smokestacks emitting steam, a prominent red bridge structure, and a colorful floating shantytown along the riverbank under bright clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk waterfront industrial district with floating shantytown

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the cyberpunk cityscape from an elevated waterfront position

entered.detail: large red metal bridge structure spanning the river with industrial piping and support beams
cluster of tall smokestacks emitting white steam and smoke into the atmosphere
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with sharp spires and holographic billboards
colorful floating dock structures with teal and rust-colored rooftops along the muddy riverbank
murky green-brown water surface reflecting the industrial structures above

segments.scene_description: A static panoramic view of a cyberpunk waterfront district under clear midday skies. The camera captures a red industrial bridge on the left, active smokestacks venting steam in the center distance, a futuristic neon-lit skyline rising in the background, and a vibrant floating shantytown clustering along the right riverbank. The scene remains entirely static with only subtle environmental animations of smoke and water movement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static panoramic vista of a futuristic waterfront district under the brilliance of clear midday skies. It begins by capturing a wide view of a red industrial bridge on the left, while active smokestacks vent plumes of steam into the center distance. The perspective then encompasses a towering, neon-lit skyline that rises sharply in the background, contrasting with the organic clutter of a vibrant floating shantytown clustered along the right riverbank. The scene remains poised in a singular composition, with the only movement being the subtle, rhythmic drift of smoke and the gentle flow of the water below.
